SOV_expand_eurasia = {

			tag = SOV

		visible = {
			always = no
			#has_completed_focus = SOV_prepare_the_dismantle_of_china

			tag = SOV
			num_of_nukes > 10

			base = 20

SOV_prepare_the_union_state_category = {
	integrate_belarusian_infastructure = {
		visible = {
			has_completed_focus = SOV_prepare_the_union_state
			OR = {
				has_country_leader = {
					character = SOV_mikhail_mishustin
					ruling_only = yes
				}
				has_country_leader = {
					character = SOV_vladimir_putin
					ruling_only = yes
				}
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_integrate_belarusian_infastructure
		cancel_if_not_visible = yes
		fire_only_once = yes
		available = {
			NOT = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_integrating_belarus
			}
		}
		complete_effect = {
			set_country_flag = SOV_integrating_belarus
		}
		remove_effect = {
			BLR = {
				204 = {
					add_building_construction = {
						type = infrastructure
						level = 2
						instant_build = yes
					}
				}
				207 = {
					add_building_construction = {
						type = infrastructure
						level = 2
						instant_build = yes
					}
				}
				206 = {
					add_building_construction = {
						type = infrastructure
						level = 2
						instant_build = yes
					}
				}
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				clr_country_flag = SOV_integrating_belarus
				set_country_flag = SOV_integrated_infastructure
			}
		}
		days_remove = 56
		cost = 50
	}
	integrate_belarusian_politics = {
		visible = {
			has_completed_focus = SOV_prepare_the_union_state
			OR = {
				has_country_leader = {
					character = SOV_mikhail_mishustin
					ruling_only = yes
				}

		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_integrate_belarusian_politics
		fire_only_once = yes
		cancel_if_not_visible = yes
		available = {
			NOT = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_integrating_belarus
			}
		}
		complete_effect = {
			set_country_flag = SOV_integrating_belarus
		}
		remove_effect = {
			add_stability = 0.05
			every_state = {
				limit = {
					is_core_of = BLR
				}
				add_core_of = ROOT
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				clr_country_flag = SOV_integrating_belarus
				set_country_flag = SOV_integrated_politics
			}
		}
		days_remove = 56
		cost = 50
	}

			}

			}
		}
		days_remove = 56
		cost = 75
	}
	proclaim_the_union_state = {
		visible = {
			OR = {
				has_country_leader = {
					character = SOV_mikhail_mishustin
					ruling_only = yes
				}
				has_country_leader = {
					character = SOV_vladimir_putin
					ruling_only = yes
				}
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_proclaim_the_union_state
		fire_only_once = yes
		cancel_if_not_visible = yes
		available = {
			NOT = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_integrating_belarus
			}
			has_country_flag = SOV_integrated_industry
			has_country_flag = SOV_integrated_infastructure
			has_country_flag = SOV_integrated_politics
			country_exists = BLR
		}
		complete_effect = {
			hidden_effect = {
				clr_country_flag = SOV_integrating_belarus
				clr_country_flag = SOV_integrated_industry
				clr_country_flag = SOV_integrated_infastructure
				clr_country_flag = SOV_integrated_politics
			}
		}
		remove_effect = {
			add_threat = 5
			effect_tooltip = {
				set_autonomy = {
					target = BLR
					autonomous_state = autonomy_union_state_subject
				}
			}
			add_ideas = SOV_union_state1
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_appoint_cochairman_union_state_tt
			show_ideas_tooltip = SOV_union_state_co_chairman_lukashenko
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_belarus_state_modifier_tt
			hidden_effect = {
				add_ideas = SOV_union_state_co_chairman_lukashenko
				set_country_flag = SOV_annexed_belarus
				news_event = {
					id = news.294
					days = 1
				}
				BLR = {
					get_current_government_type = yes
				}
				set_autonomy = {
					target = BLR
					autonomous_state = autonomy_union_state_subject
				}
				BLR = {
					restore_previous_government_type = yes
				}
			}
		}
		days_remove = 70
		cost = 100
	}
}

SOV_the_house_of_cards = {
	SOV_handle_covid_mission = {

			}
		}
		days_mission_timeout = 250
		activation = {
			always = no
		}

		}

		ai_will_do = {
			base = 50
		}
		timeout_effect = {
			SOV_increase_corona = yes
			activate_mission = SOV_handle_covid_mission
		}
	}
	SOV_countdown_day_mission = {

	SOV_constitution_russian_voting = {
		priority = 1
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_president_election_category
		available = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				NOT = {
					original_tag = SOV
				}
			}
		}
		days_mission_timeout = 160
		activation = {
			always = no
		}
		visible = {
		}
		fire_only_once = no
		cancel_if_not_visible = no
		is_good = no
		complete_effect = {
		}
		timeout_effect = {
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_constitution_russian_voting_tt
			hidden_effect = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						check_variable = {
							var = SOV_election_approval_rating_ur_var
							value = 0.50
							compare = greater_than_or_equals
						}
					}
					country_event = { id = russia.462 hours = 3 } #perfect referendum
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = {
						check_variable = {
							var = SOV_election_approval_rating_ur_var
							value = 0.50
							compare = less_than
						}
					}
					country_event = { id = russia.463 hours = 3 } #faulty referendum
				}
			}
		}
	}
	SOV_pawns_making_moves_mission = {
		priority = 1
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_pawns_making_moves
		available = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				has_completed_focus = SOV_what_now
			}
		}
		priority = 1
		fire_only_once = no
		days_mission_timeout = 60
		is_good = no
		cancel_if_not_visible = yes

			always = no
		}
		visible = {
		}
		complete_effect = {
		}
		timeout_effect = {
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_opposition_growth_tt
			hidden_effect = {
				activate_mission = SOV_pawns_making_moves_mission
				random_list = {
					25 = {
						set_temp_variable = {
							var = SOV_election_approval_rating_ldpr_var_temp
							value = 0.015
						}
						SOV_add_election_approval_rating_ldpr = yes
						set_temp_variable = {
							var = SOV_election_approval_rating_cprf_var_temp
							value = 0.015
						}
						SOV_add_election_approval_rating_cprf = yes
					}
					50 = {
						set_temp_variable = {
							var = SOV_election_approval_rating_ldpr_var_temp
							value = 0.01
						}
						SOV_add_election_approval_rating_ldpr = yes
						set_temp_variable = {
							var = SOV_election_approval_rating_cprf_var_temp
							value = 0.01
						}
						SOV_add_election_approval_rating_cprf = yes
					}
				}
				random = {
					chance = 10
					country_event = { id = russia.479 days = 20 random_days = 10 }
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = fascist
						popularity = 0.015
					}		
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = communist
						popularity = 0.015
					}
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = libertarian_socialist
						popularity = 0.01
					}
				}
				random = {
					chance = 10
					country_event = { id = russia.480 days = 20 random_days = 10 }
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = fascist
						popularity = 0.015
					}		
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = communist
						popularity = 0.015
					}
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = libertarian_socialist
						popularity = 0.01
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

					value = 0.02
				}
				SOV_add_election_approval_rating_ur = yes
			}
		}

			base = 35
		}

			}
		}

		}

				add_timed_idea = {
					idea = SOV_wagner_mercs

				}

						name = "CHVK Wagner"

								y = 0
							}

								x = 0
								y = 1
							}

								x = 0
								y = 2
							}

								x = 0
								y = 3
							}

								x = 1
								y = 0
							}

								x = 2
								y = 0
							}

								x = 2
								y = 1
							}
						}

							signal_company = {
								x = 0
								y = 0
							}
							mot_recon = {
								x = 0
								y = 1
							}
						}
					}
					random_owned_controlled_state = {
						create_unit = {
							division = "name = \"Wagner-Brigade\" division_template = \"CHVK Wagner\" start_experience_factor = 0.2"
							owner = MLI
						}
						create_unit = {
							division = "name = \"Wagner-Brigade\" division_template = \"CHVK Wagner\" start_experience_factor = 0.2"
							owner = MLI
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}

	SOV_expand_african_corps_mission_in_mali = {
		visible = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_mali_partnership_military_flag
			MLI = {
				exists = yes
			}
			NOT = { has_global_flag = global_sahel_federation_formed_flag }
		}
		cancel_if_not_visible = yes
		modifier = {
			command_power_gain = 0.05
			experience_gain_army_factor = 0.05
			experience_gain_air_factor = 0.05
			training_time_army_factor = 0.025
			misc_expense = 5
		}
		complete_effect = {
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = income_var_temp
				value = -20
			}
			add_income = yes
			MLI = {
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_russian_african_corps_idea
					add_idea = SOV_russian_african_corps_2_idea
				}
			}
		}
		remove_effect = {
			MLI = {
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_russian_african_corps_2_idea
					add_idea = SOV_russian_african_corps_idea
				}
				hidden_effect = {
					random_owned_controlled_state = {
						create_unit = {
							division = "name = \"African Corps\" division_template = \"Bataillon d'Infanterie\" start_experience_factor = 0.2"
							owner = MLI
						}
						create_unit = {
							division = "name = \"African Corps\" division_template = \"Bataillon d'Infanterie\" start_experience_factor = 0.2"
							owner = MLI
						}
					}
				}
			}
			add_doctrine_cost_reduction = {
				cost_reduction = 0.05
				uses = 1
				category = infantry_tech
			}				
			add_doctrine_cost_reduction = {
				cost_reduction = 0.05
				uses = 1
				category = cat_mass_assault
			}	
			add_doctrine_cost_reduction = {
				cost_reduction = 0.05
				uses = 1
				category = cat_mobile_warfare
			}			
			add_doctrine_cost_reduction = {
				cost_reduction = 0.05
				uses = 1
				category = cat_superior_firepower
			}
		}
		days_remove = 120
		days_re_enable = 200
		icon = GFX_decision_SOV_russian_africa
		cost = 75
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 35
		}
	}
	SOV_economic_trade_agreements_with_mali = {
		visible = {
			has_country_flag = SOV_mali_partnership_eoconmic_flag
			MLI = {
				exists = yes
			}
			NOT = { has_global_flag = global_sahel_federation_formed_flag }
		}
		available = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_contact_ongoing_africa_flag }
			}
		}
		cancel_if_not_visible = yes
		modifier = {
			industrial_capacity_factory = 0.015
			industrial_capacity_dockyard = 0.015
			production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.05
			production_speed_nuclear_reactor_factor = 0.023
			production_speed_rail_way_factor = 0.03
			income_growth_factor = 0.1
			interest_rate_factor = 0.05
		}
		complete_effect = {
			set_country_flag = SOV_contact_ongoing_africa_flag
			MLI = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_idea = SOV_russo_african_economic_partnership_idea
					}
					modify_timed_idea = {
						idea = SOV_russo_african_economic_partnership_idea
						days = 75
					}
				}
				else = {
					add_timed_idea = {
						idea = SOV_russo_african_economic_partnership_idea
						days = 75
					}
				}
			}
		}
		remove_effect = {
			clr_country_flag = SOV_contact_ongoing_africa_flag
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = income_var_temp
				value = 100
			}
			add_income = yes
			MLI = {
				random_list = {
					50 = {
						random_owned_controlled_state = {
							add_building_construction = {
								type = infrastructure
								level = 2
								instant_build = yes
							}
							add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 2
						}
						random_owned_controlled_state = {
							add_building_construction = {
								type = infrastructure
								level = 2
								instant_build = yes
							}
							add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 2
						}
					}
					40 = {
						random_owned_controlled_state = {
							add_building_construction = {
								type = industrial_complex
								level = 1
								instant_build = yes
							}
							add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1		
						}
						random_owned_controlled_state = {
							add_building_construction = {
								type = synthetic_refinery
								level = 1
								instant_build = yes
							}
							add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1
						}
					}
					20 = {
						random_owned_controlled_state = {
							limit = {
								is_core_of = ROOT
								is_able_to_build_power_plant_in_state = yes
								free_building_slots = {
									building = nuclear_reactor
									size > 0
									include_locked = yes
								}
							}
							add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1
							add_building_construction = {
								type = nuclear_reactor
								level = 1
								instant_build = yes
							}
						}
					}
				}
				hidden_effect = {
					random_list = {
						50 = {
							random_owned_controlled_state = {
								add_resource = {
									type = oil
									amount = 3
								}
							}
						}	
						50 = {
							random_owned_controlled_state = {
								add_resource = {
									type = steel
									amount = 2
								}
							}
						}		
						50 = {
							random_owned_controlled_state = {
								add_resource = {
									type = rubber
									amount = 3
								}
							}
						}	
						50 = {
							random_owned_controlled_state = {
								add_resource = {
									type = tungsten
									amount = 2
								}
							}
						}	
						50 = {
							random_owned_controlled_state = {
								add_resource = {
									type = chromium
									amount = 2
								}
							}
						}		
						50 = {
							random_owned_controlled_state = {
								add_resource = {
									type = aluminium
									amount = 2
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		days_remove = 100
		days_re_enable = 100
		icon = GFX_decision_SOV_russian_africa_ruble
		cost = 50
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 40
		}
	}

				value = 50
			}
			SOV_has_party_legitimacy_greater_than_or_equals = yes
			social_democrat < 0.1
		}
		complete_effect = {
		}
		remove_effect = {
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = SOV_party_legitimacy_temp
				value = party_popularity@social_democrat
			}
			multiply_temp_variable = { SOV_party_legitimacy_temp = -100 }
			SOV_add_party_legitimacy = yes
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = SOV_ban_party_temp
				value = party_popularity@social_democrat
			}
			multiply_temp_variable = { SOV_ban_party_temp = -1 }
			add_popularity = {
				ideology = social_democrat
				popularity = SOV_ban_party_temp
			}
			remove_from_array = { SOV_other_parties = BOL.id }
			hidden_effect = {
				set_party_name = { ideology = social_democrat long_name = SOV_outlawed_party name = SOV_outlawed_party }
				add_popularity = {
					ideology = social_democrat
					popularity = -100
				}
				add_country_leader_role = {
					character = SOV_disorganized_leadership
					promote_leader = yes
					country_leader = {
						ideology = reformist_socialism_socdem
						expire = "1.1.1.1"
						traits = {  }
					}
				}
				SOV_supreme_soviet_calculate = yes
			}
		}
		cost = 100
		days_remove = 15
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_SOV_ban_party
		fire_only_once = yes
	}

	SOV_abolish_post_of_president = {
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_SOV_abolish_post_of_president
		visible = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				OR = {
					has_completed_focus = SOV_role_of_personality
					has_completed_focus = SOV_voice_of_the_streets
					has_completed_focus = SOV_cohesion_before_challenges
				}
				NOT = {
					has_global_flag = SOV_first_nato_war_victory
				}
			}
		}
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 100
		}
		fire_only_once = yes
		complete_effect = {
			clr_country_flag = head_of_gov_ui_enabled
			clr_country_flag = SOV_role_of_personality_flag
			set_country_flag = SOV_abolish_post_of_president_flag
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_soviet_constitution_rsfsr_role_of_personality
				add_idea = SOV_soviet_constitution_rsfsr_role_of_personality_2
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_country_flag = SOV_zyuganov_supreme_soviet_leader_flag
				}
				hidden_effect = {
					remove_ideas = SOV_Gennady_Zyuganov_leader
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_country_flag = SOV_renewed_program_flag_1
					}
					promote_character = {
						character = SOV_gennady_zyuganov
						ideology = market_socialism
					}
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = {
						has_country_flag = SOV_renewed_program_flag_2
					}
					promote_character = {
						character = SOV_gennady_zyuganov
						ideology = left_nationalism
					}
				}
				else = {
					promote_character = {
						character = SOV_gennady_zyuganov
						ideology = marxism_leninism
					}
				}
				promote_character = {
					character = SOV_gennady_zyuganov
					ideology = communist_populism
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_country_flag = SOV_rashkin_supreme_soviet_leader_flag
				}
				hidden_effect = {
					remove_ideas = SOV_Valery_Rashkin_leader
					remove_ideas = SOV_Valery_Rashkin_2_leader
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_government = communist
						has_completed_focus = SOV_pragmatic_approach
					}
					promote_character = {
						character = SOV_valery_rashkin
						ideology = market_socialism
					}
				}
				else = {
					promote_character = {
						character = SOV_valery_rashkin
						ideology = marxism_leninism
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_completed_focus = SOV_reinvent_democracy
					}
					promote_character = {
						character = SOV_valery_rashkin
						ideology = post_leftism
					}
				}
				else = {
					promote_character = {
						character = SOV_valery_rashkin
						ideology = communist_populism
					}
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_country_flag = SOV_afonin_supreme_soviet_leader_flag
				}
				hidden_effect = {
					remove_ideas = SOV_Yuri_Afonin_leader
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_country_flag = SOV_afonin_selected_flag
					}
					remove_country_leader_trait = hos_powerless_president
				}
				else = {
					promote_character = {
						character = SOV_yuri_afonin
						ideology = marxism_leninism
					}
					promote_character = {
						character = SOV_yuri_afonin
						ideology = communist_populism
					}
				}
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = SOV_party_unity_temp
				value = -2.5
			}
			SOV_add_party_unity = yes
		}
		cost = 75
	}
	SOV_new_guard_support_pluralism = {
		visible = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				OR = {
					has_completed_focus = SOV_socialist_pluralism
					has_completed_focus = SOV_reinvent_democracy
				}
				has_power_balance = {
					id = SOV_communist_party_balance
				}
				NOT = {
					has_global_flag = SOV_first_nato_war_victory
				}
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_political_pluralism
		available = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				tag = SOV
			}
		}
		cancel_if_not_visible = yes
		modifier = {
			political_power_gain = 0.2
		}
		fire_only_once = yes
		days_remove = 35
		cost = 25
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 20
		}
		remove_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_active_mission = SOV_conservative_revolution_mission
				}
				add_days_mission_timeout = {
					mission = SOV_conservative_revolution_mission
					days = 100
				}
			}
			add_stability = -0.05
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = SOV_adl_progress_influence_var_temp
				value = 0.035
			}
			SOV_add_adl_progress_influence = yes
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = SOV_peoples_front_influence_var_temp
				value = 0.035
			}
			SOV_add_peoples_front_influence = yes
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = SOV_ldpr_influence_var_temp
				value = 0.035
			}
			SOV_add_ldpr_influence = yes
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = SOV_labor_fatherland_influence_var_temp
				value = 0.035
			}
			SOV_add_labor_fatherland_influence = yes
			hidden_effect = {
				country_event = {
					id = russia.226
					days = 65
					random_days = 25
				}
				set_country_flag = SOV_supported_pluralism
				add_popularity = {
					ideology = communist
					popularity = -0.05
				}
				SOV_update_party_legitimacy = yes
				force_update_dynamic_modifier = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

SOV_political_simulation_category = {
	SOV_create_all_russian_stalin_guard = {
		visible = {
			tag = SOV
			NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_create_marxist_leninist_bolshevik_party_flag }
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_stalinist_emblem
		fire_only_once = yes
		modifier = {
			totalitarian_socialist_drift = 0.025
		}
		complete_effect = {
			set_country_flag = SOV_create_all_russian_stalin_guard_flag
		}
		remove_effect = {
			effect_tooltip = {
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_simulacra_democracy_dummy
					add_idea = SOV_simulacra_democracy_all_russian_stalin_guard
				}
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = totalitarian_socialist
				long_name = SOV_surkov_totsoc_1_long
				name = SOV_surkov_totsoc_1
			}
			add_to_variable = {
				var = SOV_simulacra_democracy_war_support_factor_dynamic_var
				value = 0.02
			}		
			add_to_variable = {
				var = SOV_simulacra_democracy_industrial_capacity_factory_dynamic_var
				value = 0.025
			}
		}
		days_remove = 31
		cost = 30
	}	
	SOV_create_marxist_leninist_bolshevik_party = {
		visible = {
			tag = SOV
			NOT = { has_country_flag = SOV_create_all_russian_stalin_guard_flag }
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_stalinist_emblem
		fire_only_once = yes
		modifier = {
			totalitarian_socialist_drift = 0.025
		}
		complete_effect = {
			set_country_flag = SOV_create_marxist_leninist_bolshevik_party_flag
		}
		remove_effect = {
			effect_tooltip = {
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_simulacra_democracy_dummy
					add_idea = SOV_simulacra_democracy_marxist_leninist_bolshevik_party
				}
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = totalitarian_socialist
				long_name = SOV_surkov_totsoc_2_long
				name = SOV_surkov_totsoc_2
			}
			add_to_variable = {
				var = SOV_simulacra_democracy_production_speed_arms_factory_factor_dynamic_var
				value = 0.035
			}		
			add_to_variable = {
				var = SOV_simulacra_democracy_welfare_laws_cost_factor_dynamic_var
				value = 0.1
			}		
			add_to_variable = {
				var = SOV_simulacra_democracy_society_development_monthly_dynamic_var
				value = -0.025
			}
		}
		days_remove = 31
		cost = 30
	}

					limit = {
						is_core_of = KYR
					}
					add_core_of = SOV
				}

					limit = {
						is_core_of = TMS
					}
					add_core_of = SOV
				}

						is_core_of = TAJ
					}
					add_core_of = SOV
				}
			}
		}

				}				
			}
		}
		complete_effect = {
		}

			if = {
				limit = {
					TRA = {
						exists = yes
					}
				}
				SOV = {
					annex_country = {
						target = TRA
						transfer_troops = yes
					}
				}	
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					MOL = {
						exists = yes
					}
				}
				SOV = {
					annex_country = {
						target = MOL
						transfer_troops = yes
					}
				}	
			}
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						is_core_of = MOL
						is_core_of = TRA
					}
					NOT = {
						is_core_of = SOV
					}
				}
				add_core_of = SOV
			}
			add_popularity = {
				ideology = fascist
				popularity = 0.025
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_subigate_RUS
		cost = 50
		fire_only_once = yes

	SOV_destroy_far_left_dissent = {
		priority = 1
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_center_e
		available = {
		}
		days_remove = 70
		cost = 75
		activation = {
			always = no
		}
		visible = {
			has_completed_focus = SOV_cross_out_the_outsiders
		}
		fire_only_once = yes
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 50
		}
		complete_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_idea = SOV_counter_extremist_divison_idea 
				}
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_counter_extremist_divison_idea
					add_idea = SOV_counter_extremist_divison_1_idea
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_idea = SOV_counter_extremist_divison_1_idea }
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_counter_extremist_divison_1_idea
					add_idea = SOV_counter_extremist_divison_2_idea
				}
			}	
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_idea = SOV_counter_extremist_divison_2_idea }
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_counter_extremist_divison_2_idea
					add_idea = SOV_counter_extremist_divison_3_idea
				}
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = totalitarian_socialist
				long_name = SOV_outlawed_party
				name = SOV_outlawed_party
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = communist
				long_name = SOV_outlawed_party
				name = SOV_outlawed_party
			}
			set_party_name = {
				ideology = libertarian_socialist

		custom_cost_text = 5_stability_25_pp_cost
		custom_cost_trigger = {
			has_political_power > 25
		}
		days_remove = 8
		complete_effect = {
			hidden_effect = {
				add_stability = -0.05
				add_political_power = 25
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_freeze_social_payments_crisis_tt
			hidden_effect = {
				modify_timed_idea = {
					idea = generic_world_wide_financial_crisis_2
					days = -50
				}
			}
		}
		remove_effect = {
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = SOV_election_approval_rating_ur_var_temp
				value = -0.05
			}
			SOV_add_election_approval_rating_ur = yes
		}
	}
	SOV_infiltrate_CPRF_decision = {
		visible = {
			tag = SOV
			has_completed_focus = SOV_support_two_party_system
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_CPFR
		fire_only_once = yes
		days_remove = 40
		cost = 50
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 100
		}
		available = {
			NOT = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_political_action
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			communist_drift = -0.025
			libertarian_socialist_drift = -0.015
			authoritarian_democrat_drift = 0.02
		}
		complete_effect = {
			set_country_flag = SOV_political_action
		}
		remove_effect = {
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_end_cprf_criticism_tt
			set_country_flag = SOV_infiltrated_CPRF
			SOV_decrease_reforming_the_system = yes
			if = {
				limit = {
					#has_completed_focus = SOV_ Бля что тут вообще происходит? Я вахуе.
					always = no
				}
				add_popularity = {
					ideology = authoritarian_democrat
					popularity = 0.05
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_completed_focus = SOV_amend_the_constitution
				}
				add_popularity = {
					ideology = conservative
					popularity = 0.02
				}
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				clr_country_flag = SOV_political_action
			}
		}
	}

	SOV_uss_integrate_ukr = {
		visible = {
			tag = SOV
			has_completed_focus = SOV_bureaucratic_integration
		}
		available = {
			NOT = {
				has_country_flag = USS_integration
			}
		}
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 10
		}
		days_remove = 30
		fire_only_once = yes
		complete_effect = {
			set_country_flag = USS_integration
		}
		remove_effect = {
			every_state = {
				limit = {
					is_core_of = UKR
				}
				add_core_of = SOV
			}
			SOV_decrease_uss_union_integration = yes
			clr_country_flag = USS_integration
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_country_flag = sovereign_unity
				}
				every_state = {
					limit = {
						is_core_of = UKR
						NOT = {
							is_core_of = NOV
						}
					}
					add_dynamic_modifier = {
						modifier = SOV_uss_socialist
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_country_flag = sovereign_sovereignity
				}
				random_list = {
					25 = {
						every_state = {
							limit = {
								is_core_of = UKR
								NOT = {
									is_core_of = NOV
								}
							}
							add_dynamic_modifier = {
								modifier = SOV_uss_socialist
							}
						}
					}
					50 = {
						every_state = {
							limit = {
								is_core_of = UKR
								NOT = {
									is_core_of = NOV
								}
							}
							add_dynamic_modifier = {
								modifier = SOV_uss_centrist
							}
						}
					}
					25 = {
						every_state = {
							limit = {
								is_core_of = UKR
								NOT = {
									is_core_of = NOV
								}
							}
							add_dynamic_modifier = {
								modifier = SOV_uss_rightist
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		cost = 100
	}

			}
		}
		remove_effect = {
			custom_effect_tooltip = SOV_push_for_novorossiyan_unification_2_tt
			hidden_effect = {

					set_cosmetic_tag = NOV_unified
					set_party_name = {
						ideology = authoritarian_democrat
						long_name = NOV_authdem_united_party

					}

					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_NOV_pushilin_leader_flag }

						promote_character = {
							character = NOV_denis_pushilin
							ideology = hybrid_regime
						}
						remove_ideas = NOV_lugansk_reform_frenzy_idea
						add_ideas = DPR_zakharchenko_legacy_idea
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_NOV_lugansk_capital_flag }
					NOV = {
						annex_country = {
							target = DPR
							transfer_troops = yes
						}
					}

						add_core_of = NOV
					}		
					1374 = {
						add_core_of = NOV
					}		
					1091 = {
						add_core_of = NOV
					}	
					227 = {
						remove_core_of = DPR
					}
					1374 = {
						remove_core_of = DPR
					}		
					1091 = {
						remove_core_of = DPR
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = { has_country_flag = SOV_NOV_donetsk_capital_flag }
					NOV = {
						annex_country = {
							target = DPR
							transfer_troops = yes
						}
						set_capital = {
							state = 227
							remember_old_capital = yes
						}
					}
					227 = {
						add_core_of = NOV
					}		
					1374 = {
						add_core_of = NOV
					}

				target_province = 719
			}
		}
		days_mission_timeout = 100

			always = no
		}
		visible = {
		}
		fire_only_once = no
		cancel_if_not_visible = yes
		is_good = no

			add_political_power = -50
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = SOV_oligarch_approval_rating_var_temp
				value = -0.05
			}

			clr_country_flag = SOV_oligarchs_investment
		}
		complete_effect = {
			ROOT = {
				add_political_power = 50

					var = SOV_oligarch_approval_rating_var_temp
					value = 0.05
				}

					remove_idea = SOV_democratization_of_the_army_idea
					add_idea = SOV_democratization_of_the_army_1_idea
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_idea = SOV_democratization_of_the_army_1_idea }
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_democratization_of_the_army_1_idea
					add_idea = SOV_democratization_of_the_army_2_idea
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_idea = SOV_democratization_of_the_army_2_idea }
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_democratization_of_the_army_2_idea
					add_idea = SOV_democratization_of_the_army_3_idea
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = { has_idea = SOV_democratization_of_the_army_3_idea }
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_democratization_of_the_army_3_idea
					add_idea = SOV_grand_army_of_the_democratic_russia_idea
				}
				set_country_flag = SOV_army_secured_flag
			}
			add_war_support = -0.05
			retire_character = SOV_sergey_shoygu
			retire_character = SOV_aleksandr_dvornikov
			retire_character = SOV_yunus_bek_yevkurov
			random_character = {
				limit = {
					is_corps_commander = yes
				}
				retire = yes
			}	
			random_character = {
				limit = {
					is_corps_commander = yes
				}
				retire = yes
			}
			custom_effect_tooltip = tooltip_white_line
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_active_mission = SOV_coming_right_wing_coup_mission
				}
				add_days_mission_timeout = {
					mission = SOV_coming_right_wing_coup_mission
					days = 30
				}
			}
		}
	}

			random_list = {
				60 = {
					set_temp_variable = {
						var = society_development_var_temp
						value = 0.05
					}
					add_society_development = yes
					activate_mission = SOV_veche_session_mission

					set_temp_variable = {
						var = academic_development_var_temp
						value = 0.05
					}
					add_academic_development = yes
					activate_mission = SOV_veche_session_mission
				}
				30 = {
					random_owned_controlled_state = {
						limit = {
							free_building_slots = {
								building = infrastructure
								size > 0
							}
						}
						add_building_construction = {
							type = infrastructure
							level = 1
							instant_build = yes

					has_state_flag = SOV_new_oligarchs_build_factory

	SOV_negotiate_with_moderates = {
		visible = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				tag = SOV
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_communist_diplomacy
		available = {
		}
		cancel_if_not_visible = yes
		modifier = {
		}
		fire_only_once = yes
		days_remove = 10
		cost = 30
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 5
		}
		remove_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_government = communist
				}
				random_list = {
					60 = {
						country_event = {
							id = russia.229
						}
					}
					40 = {
						country_event = {
							id = russia.230
						}
					}
				}
				add_popularity = {
					ideology = communist
					popularity = -0.025
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_government = libertarian_socialist
				}
				random_list = {
					80 = {
						country_event = {
							id = russia.229
						}
					}

			}
			HUN = {
				NOT = {
					is_in_faction_with = SOV
				}
				NOT = {
					is_puppet_of = SOV
				}
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_communist_diplomacy
		available = {
			HUN = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						SOV = {
							has_completed_focus = SOV_free_interpretation_of_socialism
						}
					}
					communist > 0.25
				}
				else_if = {
					communist > 0.4
				}
			}
		}
		modifier = {
		}
		fire_only_once = yes
		days_remove = 0
		cost = 0
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 10
		}
		remove_effect = {
			add_to_faction = HUN
			HUN = {
				clr_country_flag = global_ass_lol
				set_country_flag = mto_member
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_completed_focus = SOV_free_interpretation_of_socialism
				}
				HUN = {
					country_event = {
						id = russia.127
						days = 50
						random_days = 20
					}
					remove_ideas = SOV_unstable_government
				}
			}
		}
	}

SOV_ldpr_alliance_category = {
	SOV_support_hungary_ldpr = {
		visible = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				tag = SOV
			}
			HUN = {
				NOT = {
					is_in_faction_with = SOV
				}
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_influence_RUS
		available = {
		}
		fire_only_once = no
		days_remove = 30
		days_re_enable = 10
		cost = 20
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 100
		}
		remove_effect = {
			HUN = {
				add_popularity = {
					ideology = fascist
					popularity = 0.05
				}
			}
		}
	}
	SOV_invite_hungary_to_ldpr = {
		visible = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				tag = SOV
			}
			HUN = {
				NOT = {
					is_in_faction_with = SOV
				}
				NOT = {
					is_puppet_of = SOV
				}
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_influence_RUS
		available = {
			HUN = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						SOV = {
							has_completed_focus = SOV_reform_csto
						}
					}
					fascist > 0.25
				}
				else_if = {
					fascist > 0.4
				}
			}
		}
		modifier = {
		}
		fire_only_once = yes
		days_remove = 0
		cost = 0
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 25
		}
		remove_effect = {
			add_to_faction = HUN
			HUN = {
				clr_country_flag = global_ass_lol
				if = {
					limit = { has_completed_focus = SOV_holy_union_reborn } 
					set_country_flag = hu_member
				}	
				if = {
					limit = { has_completed_focus = SOV_reform_csto } 
					set_country_flag = esto_member
				}
			}
		}
	}
	SOV_puppet_hungary_ldpr = {
		visible = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				tag = SOV
			}
			HUN = {
				NOT = {
					is_puppet_of = SOV
				}
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_subigate_RUS
		available = {
			HUN = {
				is_in_faction_with = SOV
			}
		}
		modifier = {
		}
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 45
		}
		fire_only_once = yes
		days_remove = 20
		cost = 75
		remove_effect = {
			puppet = HUN
			HUN = {
				remove_ideas = SOV_unstable_government
				if = {
					limit = { SOV = { has_completed_focus = SOV_political_independency } }
					add_ideas = SOV_relaxed_political_control_idea
				}	
				if = {
					limit = { SOV = { has_completed_focus = SOV_export_national_democracy } }
					add_ideas = SOV_exported_national_democracy_idea
				}	
				if = {
					limit = { SOV = { has_completed_focus = SOV_centralized_armies } }
					add_ideas = SOV_unified_command_ldpr_idea
				}			
				if = {
					limit = { SOV = { has_completed_focus = SOV_russian_market_development } }
					add_ideas = SOV_united_economic_sphere_idea
				}			
				if = {
					limit = { SOV = { has_completed_focus = SOV_increase_direct_rule } }
					add_ideas = SOV_direct_rule_from_moscow_idea
				}	
				if = {
					limit = { SOV = { has_completed_focus = SOV_bulwark_against_decadency } }
					add_ideas = SOV_european_bulwark_idea
				}
				hidden_effect = {
					set_politics = {
						ruling_party = fascist
					}
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = fascist
						popularity = 0.21
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	SOV_improve_sez = {
		visible = {
			tag = SOV
			check_variable = { SOV_sez_count > 0 }
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_jsc
		available = {
			
		}
		modifier = {
		}
		fire_only_once = yes
		days_remove = 60
		cost = 75
		complete_effect = {
			
		}
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 10
		}
		remove_effect = {
			every_owned_state = {
				limit = {
					has_dynamic_modifier = {
						modifier = SOV_soviet_sez
					}
				}
				remove_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_soviet_sez }
				add_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = SOV_soviet_sez_2 }
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_government = totalitarian_socialist
				}
				add_popularity = {
					ideology = totalitarian_socialist
					popularity = -0.05
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_government = communist
				}
				add_popularity = {
					ideology = communist
					popularity = -0.05
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_government = libertarian_socialist
				}
				add_popularity = {
					ideology = libertarian_socialist
					popularity = -0.05
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_government = social_democrat
				}
				add_popularity = {
					ideology = social_democrat
					popularity = -0.05
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_government = authoritarian_democrat
				}
				add_popularity = {
					ideology = authoritarian_democrat
					popularity = -0.05
				}
			}
			SOV = {
				set_country_flag = SOV_improve_sez_flag
			}
		}
	}

			civilian_factory_use = 3
			income_growth_factor = -0.1
		}
		fire_only_once = yes
		days_remove = 200
		custom_cost_trigger = {
			check_variable = {
				var = income_var
				value = 1
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
			has_political_power > 25
		}
		custom_cost_text = dx_more_than_1B_and_25pp
		complete_effect = {
			add_political_power = -25
			subtract_from_variable = {
				var = income_var
				value = 1
			}
		}
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 100
		}
		remove_effect = {
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = academic_development_var_temp
				value = 0.025
			}
			add_academic_development = yes
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = industrial_development_var_temp
				value = 0.025
			}
			add_industrial_development = yes
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = society_development_var_temp
				value = 0.01
			}
			add_society_development = yes
			add_stability = 0.025
			set_country_flag = SOV_ogas_stage2_completed
		}
	}

			tag = SOV
			has_completed_focus = SOV_protect_motherlands_borders
		}

		}

		cancel_if_not_visible = no
		cost = 50
		days_remove = 5
		complete_effect = {
			add_to_faction = PER
			PER = {
				add_ideas = SOV_csto_advisors_idea
			}
		}
	}
	SOV_invite_serbia_into_csto = {
		icon = GFX_SOV_Invite_CSTO_decision
		priority = -1
		available = {
			has_war = no
			hidden_trigger = {
				country_exists = SER
				SER = {
					OR = {
						has_war = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
		visible = {
			tag = SOV
			has_completed_focus = SOV_serbia_brethren
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = SOV_our_final_war }
		}
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 75
		}
		fire_only_once = yes
		cancel_if_not_visible = no
		cost = 35
		days_remove = 5
		complete_effect = {
			SER = {
				country_event = {
					id = russia.759
					days = 5
				}
				custom_effect_tooltip = needs_approval
				event_option_tooltip = russia.759.a
			}
		}
	}	
	SOV_medvedev_support_hungary = {
		visible = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				tag = SOV
			}
			HUN = {
				NOT = {
					is_in_faction_with = SOV
				}
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_influence_RUS
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 100
		}
		available = {
		}
		fire_only_once = no
		days_remove = 20
		days_re_enable = 10
		cost = 25
		remove_effect = {
			HUN = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						SOV = {
							has_completed_focus = SOV_healthy_conservatism_to_europe
						}
					}
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = conservative
						popularity = 0.075
					}
				}
				else_if = {
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = conservative
						popularity = 0.04
					}
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = market_liberal
						popularity = 0.01
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	SOV_invite_hungary_to_csto = {
		visible = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				tag = SOV
			}
			HUN = {
				NOT = {
					is_in_faction_with = SOV

				}
			}
		}
		ai_will_do = {

		}
		modifier = {
		}
		fire_only_once = yes
		days_remove = 0
		cost = 0

				set_country_flag = csto_member

				}

						id = russia.866
					}

				}
			}
			else = {

					country_event = {

					}

				}

	SOV_medvedev_support_slovakia = {
		visible = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				tag = SOV
			}
			SLO = {
				NOT = {
					is_in_faction_with = SOV
				}
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_influence_RUS
		available = {
		}
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 100
		}
		fire_only_once = no
		days_remove = 20
		days_re_enable = 10
		cost = 25
		remove_effect = {
			SLO = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						SOV = {
							has_completed_focus = SOV_healthy_conservatism_to_europe
						}
					}
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = conservative
						popularity = 0.075
					}
				}
				else_if = {
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = market_liberal
						popularity = 0.04
					}
					add_popularity = {
						ideology = conservative
						popularity = 0.01
					}
				}
			}
		}

	SOV_add_army_bul = {
		visible = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				tag = SOV
			}
			BUL = {
				is_puppet_of = SOV
			}
			has_completed_focus = SOV_european_allies_modernisation
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_subigate_RUS
		available = {
			BUL = {
				is_in_faction_with = SOV
			}
		}
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 25
		}
		modifier = {
		}
		custom_cost_trigger = {
			check_variable = {
				var = income_var
				value = 25
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
		}
		custom_cost_text = dx_more_than_25B
		highlight_states = {
			highlight_state_targets = {
				state = 48
			}
		}
		on_map_mode = map_and_decisions_view
		fire_only_once = yes
		days_remove = 20
		complete_effect = {
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = income_var_temp
				value = -25
			}
			add_income = yes
		}
		remove_effect = {
			BUL = {
				division_template = {
					name = "Motor-Rifle Brigade"
					is_locked = yes
					priority = 0
					template_counter = 0
					regiments = {
						motorized = {
							x = 0
							y = 0
						}
						motorized = {
							x = 0
							y = 1
						}
						motorized = {
							x = 0
							y = 2
						}
						mechanized = {
							x = 0
							y = 3
						}
						modern_armor = {
							x = 1
							y = 0
						}
						modern_sp_artillery_brigade = {
							x = 2
							y = 0
						}
						spaa_brigade = {
							x = 2
							y = 1
						}
					}
					support = {
						signal_company = {
							x = 0
							y = 0
						}
						mot_recon = {
							x = 0
							y = 1
						}
					}
				}
				random_owned_controlled_state = {
					create_unit = {
						division = "name = \"Motostrelkovaya Brigada\" division_template = \"Motor-Rifle Brigade\" start_experience_factor = 0.2"
						owner = BUL
					}
					create_unit = {
						division = "name = \"Motostrelkovaya Brigada\" division_template = \"Motor-Rifle Brigade\" start_experience_factor = 0.2"
						owner = BUL
					}
					create_unit = {
						division = "name = \"Motostrelkovaya Brigada\" division_template = \"Motor-Rifle Brigade\" start_experience_factor = 0.2"
						owner = BUL
					}
					create_unit = {
						division = "name = \"Motostrelkovaya Brigada\" division_template = \"Motor-Rifle Brigade\" start_experience_factor = 0.2"
						owner = BUL
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	SOV_economic_partnership_iran_brics = {
		allowed = {
			OR = {
				tag = SOV
				tag = PRC
			}
		}
		visible = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				SOV = {
					has_completed_focus = SOV_brics
				}
			}
			PER = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_brics_member_flag
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_decision_SOV_brics_economy_decision
		available = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				OR = {
					tag = SOV
					tag = PRC
				}
			}
			NOT = {
				has_country_flag = SOV_economic_partnership_ongoing
			}
		}
		targets = {
			PER
		}
		highlight_states = {
			highlight_states_trigger = {
				is_owned_by = FROM
				is_capital = yes
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			consumer_goods_factor = -0.025
			production_speed_buildings_factor = 0.05
			production_factory_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.025
			income_growth_factor = 0.05
			business_value_factor = 0.05
		}
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 10
		}
		fire_only_once = no
		days_remove = 180
		days_re_enable = 365
		cost = 100
		complete_effect = {
			set_country_flag = SOV_economic_partnership_ongoing
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = debt_var_temp
				value = 25
			}
			add_debt = yes
			PER = {
				add_timed_idea = {
					idea = SOV_economic_assistance_idea
					days = 180
				}
			}
		}
		remove_effect = {
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = income_var_temp
				value = 25
			}
			add_income = yes
			clr_country_flag = SOV_economic_partnership_ongoing
		}
	}

SOV_coronavirus_decrease = {
	SOV_waning_coronavirus_mission = {
		icon = generic_coronavirus
		allowed = {
			tag = SOV
		}
		available = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						has_idea = SOV_coronavirus_pandemic_idea4
					}
					AND = {
						has_idea = SOV_coronavirus_pandemic_idea3
					}
					AND = {
						has_idea = SOV_coronavirus_pandemic_idea2
					}
					AND = {
						has_idea = SOV_coronavirus_pandemic_idea1
					}
					AND = {
						has_idea = SOV_coronavirus_pandemic_idea
					}
				}
			}
		}
		visible = {
			hidden_trigger = {
				NOT = {
					has_country_leader = {
						character = SOV_vladimir_putin
						ruling_only = yes
					}
					has_country_flag = SOV_dealt_with_coronavirus
					has_country_flag = SOV_corona_decision
				}
			}
		}
		cancel_if_not_visible = yes
		activation = {
			OR = {
				has_idea = SOV_coronavirus_pandemic_idea4
				has_idea = SOV_coronavirus_pandemic_idea3
				has_idea = SOV_coronavirus_pandemic_idea2
				has_idea = SOV_coronavirus_pandemic_idea1
				has_idea = SOV_coronavirus_pandemic_idea
			}
			NOT = {
				has_country_leader = {
					character = SOV_vladimir_putin
					ruling_only = yes
				}
				has_country_flag = SOV_dealt_with_coronavirus
			}
		}
		is_good = no
		selectable_mission = no
		days_mission_timeout = 50
		timeout_effect = {
			SOV_decrease_corona = yes
			activate_mission = SOV_waning_coronavirus_mission
		}
		complete_effect = {
		}
	}
}

				limit = {
					power_balance_value = {

						value > 0
					}
				}
				add_power_balance_value = {
					id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
					value = 0.1
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					power_balance_value = {
						id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
						value < 0
					}
				}
				add_power_balance_value = {
					id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
					value = -0.1
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						power_balance_value = {
							id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
							value < 0
						}

							id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
							value > 0
						}
					}
				}
				random_list = {
					50 = {
						add_power_balance_value = {
							id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
							value = 0.1
						}
					}

							id = SOV_nadezhdin_onf_balance
							value = -0.1
						}
					}
				}

SOV_russian_army_category = {
	SOV_upgrade_shoygu = {
		visible = {
			has_completed_focus = SOV_improve_deep_battle_theory
			OR = {
				has_global_flag = SOV_medvedev_won
				has_global_flag = SOV_srzp_won
				has_global_flag = SOV_ldpr_won
			}
			NOT = {
				has_global_flag = SOV_first_nato_war_victory
			}
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_upgrade_shoygu
		days_remove = 100
		fire_only_once = yes
		modifier = {
		}
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 30
		}
		custom_cost_trigger = {
			command_power > 50
			has_army_experience > 50
        }
		custom_cost_text = decision_cost_CP_50_pp_50_ArmXP_50
		complete_effect = {
			hidden_effect = {
				add_command_power = -50
				army_experience = -50
			}
		}
		complete_effect = {
			
		}
		remove_effect = {
			set_country_flag = SOV_upgrade_shoygu_flag
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_Shoygu
				add_idea = SOV_Shoygu_2
			}
		}
	}

	SOV_deal_with_logistics = {
		visible = {
			tag = SOV
			has_completed_focus = SOV_unify_command_structures
		}
		icon = GFX_SOV_decision_military_aid

				effect_tooltip = {

						remove_idea = SOV_soviet_army_blank
						add_idea = SOV_soviet_army_fight_deal_with_logistics
					}
				}
			}
			if = {

					has_global_flag = SOV_medvedev_won
				}

						add_idea = SOV_Permanent_Defense_Readiness_deal_with_logistics

						add_idea = SOV_thousand_of_banners_fight_deal_with_logistics
					}
				}
			}
			add_to_variable = {
				var = SOV_voenny_supply_node_range_dynamic
				value = 0.05
			}
			add_to_variable = {
				var = SOV_voenny_supply_factor_dynamic
				value = 0.05
			}
			set_temp_variable = {
				var = military_development_var_temp
				value = 0.05
			}
			add_military_development = yes

					add_idea = SOV_nav_economic_optimization
				}
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				add_to_variable = {
					var = SOV_navalnomika_consumer_goods_factor_dynamic
					value = -0.075
				}
				add_to_variable = {
					var = SOV_navalnomika_production_speed_buildings_factor_dynamic
					value = 0.05
				}
				add_to_variable = {
					var = SOV_navalnomika_production_factory_start_efficiency_factor_dynamic
					value = -0.05
				}
				add_to_variable = {
					var = SOV_navalnomika_production_factory_max_efficiency_factor_dynamic
					value = -0.05
				}
			}
			set_country_flag = SOV_nav_economy_decision
		}
		remove_effect = {
			effect_tooltip = {
				swap_ideas = {
					remove_idea = SOV_nav_economic_optimization
					add_idea = SOV_navalnomika_dummy
				}
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				add_to_variable = {
					var = SOV_navalnomika_consumer_goods_factor_dynamic
					value = 0.075
				}
				add_to_variable = {
					var = SOV_navalnomika_production_speed_buildings_factor_dynamic
					value = -0.05
				}
				add_to_variable = {
					var = SOV_navalnomika_production_factory_start_efficiency_factor_dynamic
					value = 0.05
				}
				add_to_variable = {
					var = SOV_navalnomika_production_factory_max_efficiency_factor_dynamic
					value = 0.05
				}
			}
			clr_country_flag = SOV_nav_economy_decision
		}
	}
	SOV_nav_jsc_bill_extend_decision = {
		icon = GFX_SOV_jsc
		fire_only_once = yes
		cost = 150
		allowed = {
			original_tag = SOV
		}
		visible = {
			has_completed_focus = SOV_underground_military_deals
			has_idea = SOV_jsc_bills
		}
		available = {
		}
		ai_will_do = {
			base = 1
		}
		modifier = {
		}
		complete_effect = {
			swap_ideas = {
				remove_idea = SOV_jsc_bills
				add_idea = SOV_jsc_bills_worse
			}
			effect_tooltip = {
				modify_timed_idea = {
					idea = SOV_jsc_bills
					days = 100
				}
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				modify_timed_idea = {
					idea = SOV_jsc_bills_worse
					days = 100
				}
			}
		}
	}
